basic_details.job_title: WCD Odisha Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Women and Child Development Department Odisha (WCD Odisha)
basic_details.short_information: Women and Child Development Department Odisha (WCD Odisha) Anganwadi Helper Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of WCD Odisha. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years | Cut-off Date: The applicant's age must fall within this range as of January 1, 2026.

qualification.details: Gender: Only female candidates are eligible to apply. Residency: The candidate must be a permanent resident of the respective Anganwadi Center area. Educational Qualification: A minimum qualification of passing the 12th standard (Plus Two) or its equivalent is required. Language Proficiency: The candidate must be able to speak, read, and write the Odia language.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of WCD Odisha to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: WCD Odisha Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the WCD Odisha Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download WCD Odisha Anganwadi Helper - Bolangir Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: WCD Odisha Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Gender : Only female candidates are eligible to apply. Residency : The candidate must be a permanent resident of the respective Anganwadi Center area. Educational Qualification : A minimum qualification of passing the 12th standard (Plus Two) or its equivalent is required. Language Proficiency : The candidate must be able to speak, read, and write the Odia language.

content_sections.heading: WCD Odisha Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years Cut-off Date: The applicant's age must fall within this range as of January 1, 2026.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of WCD Odisha to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Helper posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Anganwadi Helper positions is 15th July 2026. Ensure you complete the application process well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How can I apply for the WCD Odisha Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: You can apply online through the official website of WCD Odisha. The application link and detailed instructions are usually provided in the official notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the total number of vacancies announced?
faq.answer: The official notification indicates a total of 1 vacancy for the Anganwadi Helper post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the eligibility criteria for the Anganwadi Helper post?
faq.answer: Specific eligibility criteria, including educational qualifications and age limits, will be detailed in the official notification. Candidates are advised to check these details carefully.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is strictly online. Offline applications will not be considered.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for WCD Odisha Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: As per the available information, no specific application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for the Anganwadi Helper position?
faq.answer: The Anganwadi Helper positions are offered on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link will be available in the "Important Links" section of this article. It is recommended to download and review it thoroughly.

faq.question: Q9. What is the age limit for the Anganwadi Helper post?
faq.answer: The age limit details are not specified in the provided data. Please refer to the official notification for the exact age criteria and any applicable relaxations.

faq.question: Q10. Which department is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Women and Child Development Department Odisha (WCD Odisha).
